inputs.label: Total Daily Calories
inputs.businessContext: Total daily caloric intake target for an individual or total batch energy content for a ketogenic product.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total daily caloric intake target for an individual or total batch energy content for a ketogenic product.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birey için günlük kalori alım hedefi veya ketojenik ürün için toplam parti enerji içeriği.

inputs.label: Fat Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total calories from fat. Standard ketogenic ratio is 70-75%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total calories from fat. Standard ketogenic ratio is 70-75%.

inputs.label: Protein Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total calories from protein. Standard ketogenic ratio is 20-25%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total calories from protein. Standard ketogenic ratio is 20-25%.

inputs.label: Carbohydrate Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total calories from carbohydrates. Standard ketogenic ratio is 5-10%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total calories from carbohydrates. Standard ketogenic ratio is 5-10%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam kalorinin karbonhidratlardan gelen yüzdesi. Standart ketojenik oran %5-10'dur.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
